title: Feature Request — Bulk User Import
description: Polite feature request with use case. Tests Feature Request category, Product Team routing, Low priority, Positive sentiment.
subject: Feature suggestion: bulk user import via CSV
body:
Hi there,

First off — we love the product. Our team at Summit Education has been using it for 6 months and it has transformed how we manage student projects.

I have a feature request: would it be possible to add a bulk user import via CSV? At the start of each semester we onboard ~300 students, and adding them one-by-one is tedious. A CSV upload with columns like name, email, role, and group would be amazing.

If this is already on the roadmap, great — no worries. If not, please consider it.

Thanks for building such a great tool!

Diego Ramirez
Director of Educational Technology
Summit Education
